ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Petitioner'S Order To Show Cause Re: State Bar Jurisdiction Of Tehin Practice
Off Calendar Oct-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Alan Konig, Esq., DEPUTY TRIAL COUNSEL, THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA 538-2385, for petitioner and moving an order to show cause re: State Bar Jurisdiction of Tehin Practice
Harold John Rosenthal, Esq., 431-3472, for respondent Nikolai Tehin, specially appearing on behalf of Doron Weinberg for Pamela Stevens
* A R G U E D and the Court ordered all files from the Tehin office which were requested by the State Bar to be turned over before 5 p.m. this afternoon. State Bar is to meet with Mr. Miller to discuss about the representation of the clients. The Court scheduled a status conference on October 25, 2002 for progress report. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/301/CL) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
